prerequisites: A Google account with Google Tasks data to read.
A Google Cloud project with the Google Tasks API enabled (APIs & Services > Library > Tasks API > Enable).

OAuth 2.0 configured for the project: configure the OAuth consent screen and authorize one of the Tasks scopes (https://www.googleapis.com/auth/tasks.readonly for read-only access, or https://www.googleapis.com/auth/tasks for full access).
An OAuth credential for the api_key field (the authorized credential the connector uses to call https://tasks.googleapis.com).
A start_date value marking the earliest point from which to sync tasks (required).
Optionally, a records_limit value to cap the number of records returned per sync (optional).

authMethods.name: API key (OAuth credential)
authMethods.summary: The connector authenticates with the single required secret field api_key. The Google Tasks API itself authorizes via OAuth 2.0 against https://tasks.googleapis.com, so the api_key value must be an OAuth credential granted one of the documented Tasks scopes: https://www.googleapis.com/auth/tasks.readonly (view tasks) or https://www.googleapis.com/auth/tasks (full create, edit, and delete access). The descriptor does not expose separate client_id, client_secret, or refresh_token fields, so supply the authorized credential through api_key.

setupSteps.title: Create or select a Google Cloud project
setupSteps.body: In the Google Cloud console (console.cloud.google.com), select an existing project or create a new one to host the API access used by this connector.

setupSteps.title: Enable the Google Tasks API
setupSteps.body: In the Cloud console go to APIs & Services > Library, search for the Tasks API, open it, and click Enable for your project. This activates the https://tasks.googleapis.com service endpoint.

setupSteps.title: Configure OAuth and authorize a Tasks scope
setupSteps.body: Configure the OAuth consent screen for the project and grant one of the documented scopes: https://www.googleapis.com/auth/tasks.readonly for read-only sync, or https://www.googleapis.com/auth/tasks for full access. Use the resulting authorized OAuth credential as the connector's api_key value.

setupSteps.title: Provide credentials and configure sync settings
setupSteps.body: Enter the OAuth credential in the required api_key field. Set the required start_date to the earliest date from which tasks should be synced. Optionally set records_limit to cap the number of records returned per sync.
